scripts.android:emulator: npm run emulator:start && npm run android
scripts.android:device: npm run device:check && npm run android:reverse && react-native run-android --active-arch-only
scripts.android:dev: npm run android:reverse && npx react-native run-android --no-packager
scripts.device:check: sh -c 'COUNT=$(adb devices | grep -E "\bdevice$" | wc -l); if [ "$COUNT" = "0" ]; then echo "Nenhum device Android conectado. Use \"npm run device:list\" para conferir, ou ative Depuracao USB / pareie Wi-Fi ADB."; exit 1; else echo "$COUNT device(s) conectado(s)."; fi'
scripts.device:wifi:connect: sh -c 'if [ -z "$DEVICE_IP" ]; then echo "Defina DEVICE_IP=192.168.x.y (porta opcional :PORT, padrao 5555). Ex: DEVICE_IP=192.168.0.20 npm run device:wifi:connect"; exit 1; fi; ADDR="$DEVICE_IP"; case "$ADDR" in *:*) ;; *) ADDR="$ADDR:5555";; esac; adb connect "$ADDR"'
scripts.emulator:start: sh -c 'AVD_NAME=${AVD_NAME:-Pixel_8_API_35}; if adb devices | grep -q emulator; then echo "Emulador Android ja esta aberto"; else echo "Abrindo emulador: $AVD_NAME"; nohup emulator -avd $AVD_NAME -netdelay none -netspeed full >/tmp/ble-device-monitor-emulator.log 2>&1 & sleep 20; fi'
scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test
